memory.summary: I have a plan to finish analysis before reading, but a friend just invited me for lunch, creating a potential conflict with my schedule.
I made good progress on the analysis section, and my friends are now gathering to order lunch.
I worked for two hours but only reached 72% progress, and with less than an hour until the deadline, I am unlikely to finish on time.

I made slight progress on the course assignment, but I failed to submit the assigned reading before its 20:00 deadline.
I worked another 0.5 hours, pushing progress to 88%, but I am still late for both the assignment and reading deadlines.
I made slight progress on the analysis section, but I remain late for both deadlines despite working 0.5 hours.

After working another hour, my analysis progress is now at 0.96, yet I am still late for both deadlines and exhausted.
I worked another half-hour, bringing my analysis progress to 0.97, but I am now completely drained with zero energy and still behind schedule.
